Our Story

A Farm Built on
Passion & Purpose

Nii Kapinko Farms has been proudly serving Accra and beyond for over 4 years. Located at Nungua Nautical, we raise a wide variety of premium livestock including all breeds of chickens, cows, pigs, turkeys and guinea fowl. We also grow and sell fresh avocados and seedlings.

🐔
All Breeds AvailableCocks, hens, turkey, guinea fowl & more
🐄
All Cow BreedsName the breed — we have it
🥑
Avocado FarmFresh stock, seedlings & expert advice
📚
Farmer EducationBreed management, feeding & more

Our Animals

Premium Livestock — All Breeds

From rare breeds to common farm favourites — if you name it, we have it. All our animals are well-fed, healthy and raised with care.

Cocks & Roosters

We raise high-quality cocks of all breeds — from local Ghanaian breeds to exotic varieties. Strong, healthy and raised in a clean, spacious environment.

All Breeds Available
Hens & Layers

Our hens are excellent layers and well-maintained. Whether you want broilers, layers, or dual-purpose breeds, we stock them all year round.

Broilers · Layers · Broods
Cows — All Breeds

From dairy breeds like Friesian and Jersey to beef breeds like Hereford and Brahman — name any cow breed and we'll have it for you.

Dairy · Beef · Indigenous
Pigs

Healthy and well-raised pigs ready for purchase. We breed pigs professionally with proper nutrition, spacing and disease management protocols.

Piglets · Weaners · Growers
Turkeys

Our turkeys are raised with excellent feed quality. Great for festivals, events and commercial purposes. We have broad-breasted and heritage varieties.

Broad-breasted · Heritage
Guinea Fowl

A West African favourite! Our guinea fowl are native-raised, healthy and available year-round. Perfect for home and commercial use.

Helmeted · Pearl

📞 To purchase any animal, contact us via WhatsApp or phone to arrange pickup/delivery.

What We Offer

Farm Services

Beyond selling animals, Nii Kapinko Farms provides expert-level services to help you succeed — from feed supply to professional veterinary advice.

🛒
Animal Feed Supply

We supply quality, balanced feeds for all our farmed animals. Whether you need daily rations or bulk orders, we cater to your needs.

  • Poultry feed (layers, broilers, chicks)
  • Pig starter, grower & finisher feeds
  • Cattle concentrate & fodder
  • Turkey & guinea fowl specialist feeds
  • Bulk & retail supply available
💡
Feeding & Nutrition Advice

Not sure what to feed your animals? Our experienced team provides practical, actionable feeding advice tailored to your herd or flock.

  • Customised feeding schedules
  • Feed formulation guidance
  • Vitamin & supplement recommendations
  • Foods to avoid per animal type
  • Improving feed conversion ratios
🩺
Veterinary Advice

Professional veterinary advice for all animals on our farm. This is a paid service — contact us to discuss your needs and pricing.

  • Disease identification & management
  • Vaccination scheduling
  • Biosecurity best practices
  • Treatment & medication guidance
  • Health record management tips
💰 Paid Service — Contact to Arrange
🥑
Avocado Farm Services

We grow premium avocados and share our knowledge. Fresh stock, seedlings, or growing tips — we've got you covered.

  • Fresh avocado stock sales
  • Avocado seedlings available
  • Fast-growth farming advice
  • Soil & irrigation guidance
  • Harvest & storage tips

Nutrition Guide

What to Feed Your Animals

Essential feeding guides for every animal we raise — what to give, what to avoid, and the vitamins they need to thrive.

✅ Good Foods

  • 🌽 Maize / corn (energy)
  • 🌾 Soybean meal (protein)
  • 🐟 Fish meal
  • 🥦 Leafy greens & vegetable scraps
  • 🌾 Wheat bran & rice bran
  • 🥚 Crushed oyster shells (calcium)
  • 🐛 Mealworms & insects
  • 🍎 Fruits (no seeds)

❌ Foods to Avoid

  • 🧅 Raw onions in large amounts
  • 🍫 Chocolate or cocoa
  • 🥑 Avocado skin/pit (toxic)
  • ☕ Caffeinated products
  • 🍟 Salty or processed foods
  • 🍄 Raw mushrooms
  • 🌿 Rhubarb leaves
  • 🍇 Grape seeds in large quantity

💊 Essential Vitamins

  • Vitamin A – vision & immune function
  • Vitamin D3 – calcium absorption
  • Vitamin E – antioxidant & fertility
  • Vitamin K – blood clotting
  • Riboflavin (B2) – growth & egg production
  • Calcium & Phosphorus – shell quality

📋 Feeding Tips

  • Always provide clean, fresh water
  • Feed layers 110–120g per day
  • Broilers need 22%+ protein as chicks
  • Offer grit free-choice for digestion
  • Transition feed changes slowly

✅ Good Foods

  • 🌽 Maize, sorghum, barley
  • 🌾 Soybean meal & groundnut cake
  • 🐟 Fish meal
  • 🥔 Sweet potatoes & cassava peels
  • 🥬 Cooked vegetable waste
  • 🥛 Whey or skim milk
  • 🍌 Overripe fruits (banana, pawpaw)

❌ Foods to Avoid

  • 🐷 Raw meat or pig offal
  • 🍫 Chocolate & caffeine
  • 🫘 Raw soybeans
  • 🥚 Raw eggs (Salmonella risk)
  • 🌿 Bracken fern & nightshade
  • 🧂 Excessively salty foods
  • 🍞 Mouldy or spoiled feed

💊 Essential Vitamins

  • Vitamin A – reproduction & immunity
  • Vitamin D3 – bone development
  • Vitamin E – fertility & antioxidant
  • Iron – prevents piglet anaemia
  • Zinc – skin, hoof & immune health
  • Selenium – muscle function

📋 Feeding Tips

  • Piglets need iron injection within 3 days
  • Fresh water at all times
  • Finisher pigs: 2.5–3 kg feed/day
  • Split into 2 meals per day
  • Avoid fermented or rotten scraps

✅ Good Foods

  • 🌿 Fresh grass & quality hay
  • 🌽 Maize silage & corn stalks
  • 🌾 Concentrate feeds
  • 🥕 Carrots, beets, turnips
  • 🍌 Banana peels & pawpaw
  • 🌾 Molasses & brewer's grains
  • 🧂 Mineral salt licks

❌ Foods to Avoid

  • 🥔 Raw potatoes in large quantities
  • 🌿 Bracken fern & yew (toxic)
  • 🍫 Chocolate or cocoa by-products
  • 🧅 Onions in large amounts
  • 🌾 Mouldy hay or grain
  • 🚫 Excess grain (acidosis risk)

💊 Essential Vitamins

  • Vitamin A – immunity & reproduction
  • Vitamin D – calcium metabolism
  • Vitamin E – muscle & reproduction
  • Calcium & Phosphorus – milk & bones
  • Magnesium – grass tetany prevention
  • Copper & Zinc – hoof & coat health

📋 Feeding Tips

  • Dairy cows need higher energy pre-calving
  • Introduce concentrates gradually
  • Always provide a mineral salt lick
  • Fresh pasture is ideal — supplement with hay
  • Monitor body condition score regularly

✅ Good Foods

  • 🌽 Maize, millet, sorghum
  • 🌾 High-protein turkey starter (28%+)
  • 🐛 Insects, mealworms & earthworms
  • 🥬 Leafy greens, cabbage, kale
  • 🍎 Apples, berries (in moderation)
  • 🐟 Fish meal supplement
  • 🧂 Grit for digestion

❌ Foods to Avoid

  • 🥑 Avocado (persin toxin)
  • 🍫 Chocolate & caffeine
  • 🧅 Onions & garlic in excess
  • 🍊 Citrus fruits (digestive upset)
  • 🥜 Raw or dry beans (toxic)
  • 🌿 Nightshade plants
  • 🧂 High-salt foods

💊 Essential Vitamins

  • Vitamin A – immune & eye health
  • Vitamin D3 – bone density
  • Niacin (B3) – prevents leg weakness
  • Riboflavin – growth
  • Calcium – bone formation
  • Methionine – feather quality

📋 Feeding Tips

  • Poults need 28% protein for first 8 weeks
  • Switch to grower (20%) at 8–16 weeks
  • Fresh water always — turkeys drink heavily
  • Do NOT house with chickens (Blackhead risk)

✅ Good Foods

  • 🌽 Millet, sorghum, maize
  • 🐛 Insects, beetles, grasshoppers
  • 🌾 Starter/grower poultry pellets
  • 🥬 Leafy greens, clover
  • 🐟 Fish meal supplement
  • 🧂 Grit for digestion
  • 🌿 Wild grasses & seeds

❌ Foods to Avoid

  • 🥑 Avocado (toxic)
  • 🍫 Chocolate & caffeine
  • 🌿 Nightshade plants
  • 🥜 Raw dry beans
  • 🍟 High-salt processed food
  • 🌾 Mouldy grain or feeds

💊 Essential Vitamins

  • Vitamin A – plumage & immune system
  • Vitamin D3 – bone strength
  • Vitamin E – reproduction & immunity
  • B-complex – energy & feather growth
  • Calcium – eggshell quality
  • Selenium – antioxidant protection

📋 Feeding Tips

  • Guinea fowl are natural foragers — give space
  • Keets need 24–26% starter protein
  • Free-range environment is ideal
  • Always supply fresh water
  • Supplement with insects for best growth

Green Gold

Our Avocado Farm

Premium avocados grown with care — fresh stock, certified seedlings and expert growing advice.

Health Benefits of Avocado 🥑

❤️

Heart Health

Rich in oleic acid, avocados lower bad cholesterol and reduce the risk of heart disease.

🧠

Brain Function

Loaded with folate and Vitamin K, avocados protect against stroke and support cognitive performance.

⚡

Energy & Nutrients

Packed with Vitamins B5, B6, C, E & K, potassium, magnesium — nature's multivitamin.

🌿

Gut Health

High fibre content (7g per fruit) supports healthy digestion and feeds good gut bacteria.

👁️

Eye Protection

Contains Lutein and Zeaxanthin — antioxidants that protect the eye from UV damage.

💪

Bone Strength

Half an avocado provides 25% of the daily Vitamin K needed for bone health.

What We Offer

🛒 Fresh Avocado Stock

We sell ripe, fresh avocados in bulk and retail quantities. Perfect for households, restaurants, markets and resellers. Contact us to arrange your order.

🌱 Avocado Seedlings

Start your own avocado farm with our quality seedlings. We supply certified, disease-free seedlings ready for transplanting with advice on the best varieties for Ghana's climate.

🚀 Grow Faster Tips

We share expert advice on accelerating avocado tree growth — soil preparation, irrigation schedules, organic fertilization and pest management strategies proven over 4 years.

📞 How to Order

Simply call or WhatsApp us to discuss stock availability, seedling pricing and growing consultations. We're happy to help!

Knowledge Hub

Farmer Education Programme

We believe knowledge is the most powerful tool in farming. We share our 4+ years of experience through hands-on education and practical guidance.

01
🐣
Breed Management

Learn how to select the right breeds, manage breeding cycles, prevent inbreeding, keep proper records and maximise your flock or herd's genetic potential.

02
🏡
Housing & Biosecurity

Proper housing prevents disease and improves productivity. We teach ventilation, spacing requirements, hygiene protocols and how to set up quarantine areas.

03
💉
Vaccination & Disease Control

Understanding vaccination schedules, recognising early disease signs and implementing biosecurity measures. We guide you through the most common diseases in Ghana's climate.

04
📊
Farm Records & Profitability

Good record-keeping transforms a hobby farm into a profitable business. Track feed costs, mortality rates, production output and calculate your return on investment.

05
🌱
Sustainable Farming

Composting animal waste, using natural pesticides, water conservation and integrating crop-livestock systems for maximum efficiency and environmental sustainability.

06
🛒
Marketing Your Products

From local market access to supplying restaurants — we share insights on pricing strategies, packaging, building customer relationships and growing your farm business in Accra.

📞 Interested in farmer education? Call or WhatsApp us to discuss topics and arrangements.
